property.name: java.library.path
property.value: C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-17\bin;C:\WINDOWS\Sun\Java\bin;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-17\bin;C:\Program Files\Java\jdk1.8.0_111\bin;C:\ProgramData\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\Python39\Scripts\;C:\Python39\;C:\Program Files\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\WINDOWS\System32\Wbem;C:\WINDOWS\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\WINDOWS\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files\apache-maven-3.8.1-bin\apache-maven-3.8.1\bin;C:\Program Files\nodejs\;C:\ProgramData\chocolatey\bin;C:\apache-tomcat-7.0.77\bin;C:\Program Files\TortoiseSVN\bin;C:\Program Files (x86)\Bitvise SSH Client;C:\chromedriver_win32;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\Android\cmdline-tools\latest\bin;C:\Android\platform-tools;C:\Android\emulator;C:\Program Files\MySQL\MySQL Shell 8.0\bin\;C:\Users\rhaan\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;;C:\Program Files\JetBrains\IntelliJ IDEA Community Edition 2025.1.4\bin;;C:\Users\rhaan\AppData\Roaming\npm;C:\Users\rhaan\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code\bin;.

testcase.name: testDeleteOrderApi
testcase.system-out:
10:56:16.049 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.example.order.api.integration.OrderIntegrationTest]: OrderIntegrationTest does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 10:56:17.379 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.example.order.OrderApplication for test class com.example.order.api.integration.OrderIntegrationTest 10:56:18.625 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.devtools.restart.RestartApplicationListener -- Restart disabled due to context in which it is running

The minimum supported version is 11.0.0. Check the community dialects project for available legacy versions. 2026-06-26T10:56:35.957+02:00 WARN 8304 --- [ main] org.hibernate.orm.deprecation : HHH90000025: PostgreSQLDialect does not need to be specified explicitly using 'hibernate.dialect' (remove the property setting and it will be selected by default) 2026-06-26T10:56:45.359+02:00 INFO 8304 --- [ main] o.h.e.t.j.p.i.JtaPlatformInitiator : HHH000489: No JTA platform available (set 'hibernate.transaction.jta.platform' to enable JTA platform integration) 2026-06-26T10:56:45.637+02:00 INFO 8304 --- [ main] j.LocalContainerEntityManagerFactoryBean : Initialized JPA EntityManagerFactory for persistence unit 'default' 2026-06-26T10:56:49.198+02:00 ERROR 8304 --- [ main] o.a.catalina.core.AprLifecycleListener : An incompatible version [1.1.32] of the Apache Tomcat Native library is installed, while Tomcat requires version [1.2.34] 2026-06-26T10:56:51.089+02:00 WARN 8304 --- [ main] JpaBaseConfiguration$JpaWebConfiguration : spring.jpa.open-in-view is enabled by default. testcase.name: testValidation_BlankCustomerName_CurrentBehavior
testcase.system-out:
2026-06-26T10:57:03.623+02:00 ERROR 8304 --- [ main] c.e.order.controller.OrderController : Unexpected exception in page handler
org.springframework.web.bind.MethodArgumentNotValidException: Validation failed for argument [0] in public com.example.order.dto.OrderResponse com.example.order.controller.OrderController.createOrderApi(com.example.order.dto.OrderCreateRequest) with 3 errors: [Field error in object 'orderCreateRequest' on field 'customerName': rejected value []; codes [NotBlank.orderCreateRequest.customerName,NotBlank.customerName,NotBlank.java.lang.String,NotBlank]; arguments [org.springframework.context.support.DefaultMessageSourceResolvable: codes [orderCreateRequest.customerName,customerName]; arguments []; default message [customerName]]; default message [Customer name is required]] [Field error in object 'orderCreateRequest' on field 'customerName': rejected value []; codes [Pattern.orderCreateRequest.customerName,Pattern.customerName,Pattern.java.lang.String,Pattern]; arguments testcase.name: testUpdateOrderApi
testcase.system-out: 2026-06-26T10:57:04.312+02:00 INFO 8304 --- [ main] com.example.order.service.OrderService : Order updated: id=3 customer='Updated' item='Updated Item' qty=3 unitPrice=75.5 total=226.5

testcase.name: testCreateOrderViaForm
testcase.system-out: 2026-06-26T10:57:05.569+02:00 INFO 8304 --- [ main] com.example.order.service.OrderService : Order created successfully: id=6 customer='Bob Smith' item='Mouse' qty=5 unitPrice=25.00 total=125.00 2026-06-26T10:57:05.576+02:00 INFO 8304 --- [ main] c.e.order.controller.OrderController : Order created successfully from form: id=6

testcase.name: testCompleteOrderWorkflow
testcase.system-out: 2026-06-26T10:57:05.714+02:00 INFO 8304 --- [ main] c.e.order.controller.OrderController : API: Creating order for customer='Alice Johnson' 2026-06-26T10:57:05.732+02:00 INFO 8304 --- [ main] com.example.order.service.OrderService : Order created successfully: id=7 customer='Alice Johnson' item='Laptop' qty=2 unitPrice=899.99 total=1799.98 2026-06-26T10:57:05.870+02:00 INFO 8304 --- [ main] com.example.order.service.OrderService : Order status updated: id=7 NEW ? COMPLETED

testcase.name: testUpdateOrderStatusFromUi
testcase.system-out: 2026-06-26T10:57:06.040+02:00 INFO 8304 --- [ main] com.example.order.service.OrderService : Order status updated: id=8 NEW ? PROCESSING
